meaning: n.一种薄细的棉布,[总称]女性
examples: At the windows were curtains of snowy white jaconet muslin.
No strainers, muslin bags or other devices to imprison the tea.
The curtains are made from cotton muslin edged with a real ikat shipped over from Uzbekistan.
To even further reduce your plastic consumption, use cloth or muslin bags for your bulk items.
The longer I looked the more I noticed that she had a good figure within her plain muslin blouse.
